name: design
description: Fifteen UI/UX/web/mobile/surface design specialists plus operational task workflows. Includes design-taste (anti-bland override layer with dials, intent-first protocol, named AI tells, four pre-show checks), product/web/screen design, motion-and-interaction (with Emil Kowalski's Animation Decision Framework, Sonner/Vaul defaults), accessibility, design audits, dev-ready handoff, design process discipline, plus surface-specific authoring for 16:9 decks, 8.5x11 long-form documents, social assets (LinkedIn/Instagram), iconography (Lucide/Phosphor/Flaticon), visualization (Mermaid/napkin.ai/shadcn-charts/commission), and imagery (higgsfield: nano banana 2, seedance 2). Includes shadcn ecosystem inventories shared with the software-engineering plugin.
